mapper.select: SELECT usd.shop_id AS shopId, usd.shop_name AS shopName, usd.shop_type AS shopType, usd.shop_status AS shopStatus, usd.logo_url AS logoUrl, usd.shop_score AS shopScore, usf.update_time AS followTime FROM user_shop_follow usf INNER JOIN user_shop_display usd ON usf.shop_id = usd.shop_id WHERE usf.user_id = #{userId} AND usf.follow_status = 1 ORDER BY usf.update_time DESC
